steps.title: Spot the key conclusion
steps.content: The passage concludes that Hoocąk contains many examples of the full-word reduplication type shown in zi and zizi.

steps.title: Match the conclusion
steps.content:
Choice C directly matches what the passage concludes: that Hoocąk contains many instances of this type of reduplication. The others either falsely claim Hoocąk is unique (A), mention unmentioned languages (B), or overstate the evidence for yellow-related words (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
